title: Umami Dense Adventurous Tofu Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring orange zest and dense texture, infused with umami flavors suitable for a mealtime snack.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: low-sodium or tamari for a gluten-free option

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger; cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Fold in the block of tofu, pressing it slightly to ensure even cooking. Sauté for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Sprinkle soy sauce, brown sugar, and red pepper flakes into the pan with the tofu. Stir well to coat.
Add orange zest pieces to the mix. Cover and simmer gently for about 10 minutes until the liquid is absorbed by the tofu and flavors are evenly distributed.
Remove from heat once fully cooked. Serve hot as a snack or light meal accompaniment.
